name: subscriptionmanagement
description: This repository contains the product strategy artifact for **SubSense AI**, an AI-powered subscription intelligence and recurring expense management platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,api,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev:api -w backend" "npm run dev:worker -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.check: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend
scripts.test: npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w frontend && npm run typecheck -w backend
